resources.name: About x07lang-mcp
resources.text:
Official MCP server for the X07 language.

Primary goal: token-efficient agent coding loops.

Safety:
- No network by default.
- File access is sandboxed per tool.

resources.name: Agent playbook (token-efficient)
resources.text:
Preferred agent loop (bounded by design):
1) x07.exec_v1: run x07 with argv/args (use --json=canon + --report-out + --quiet-json when possible).
2) On failure: x07.context_pack_v1 (x07 agent context): focus the model on only the relevant code + diagnostics.
3) Fix via x07.patch_apply_v1 (x07.patchset@0.1.0).
4) Repeat x07.exec_v1.

Minimize tokens:
- Use x07.search_v1 for discovery (small hits list).
- Use resources/read for full text only when needed.
- Prefer context packs over dumping files into chat.

resources.name: WASM profile entrypoints
resources.text: {"schema_version":"x07lang.mcp.resource@0.1.0","pack":"wasm","index":"arch/wasm/index.x07wasm.json","component_index":"arch/wasm/component/index.x07wasm.component.json","wit_index":"arch/wit/index.x07wit.json","docs":["x07/docs/toolchain/wasm.md"],"commands":["x07 wasm profile validate","x07 wasm component profile validate","x07 wasm build","x07 wasm run"]}

resources.name: Web UI contracts and traces
resources.text: {"schema_version":"x07lang.mcp.resource@0.1.0","pack":"web_ui","index":"arch/web_ui/index.x07webui.json","fixtures_glob":"arch/web_ui/contracts/**/*.json","docs":["x07/docs/toolchain/wasm.md"],"commands":["x07 wasm web-ui contracts validate","x07 wasm web-ui build","x07 wasm web-ui test","x07 wasm web-ui regress from-incident"]}
